upstreams.name: superpowers
upstreams.notes: 10 skills + 1 agent cherry-picked and adapted. v5.0.5 port: implementer status protocol, escalation guidance, context isolation, visual brainstorm companion, scope check, file structure mapping, plan review loop. Original MIT license.

upstreams.name: code-review
upstreams.notes: PR-specific automated review with 5 parallel Sonnet agents. Complementary to jk-skills code-reviewer.

upstreams.name: pr-review-toolkit
upstreams.notes: 3 agents absorbed (silent-failure-hunter, pr-test-analyzer→test-analyzer, comment-analyzer→doc-analyzer). Confidence scoring pattern adopted in jk-execute. code-reviewer and code-simplifier overlap with jk-skills.

upstreams.name: feature-dev
upstreams.notes: code-explorer and code-architect agents absorbed into jk-plan Phase 1 and Phase 4. Workflow superseded by jk-plan + jk-execute. code-reviewer overlaps with jk-skills.

upstreams.name: claude-md-management
upstreams.notes: Quality criteria, update guidelines, and routing patterns absorbed into jk-remember and jk-execute knowledge promotion. revise-claude-md command subsumed by jk-remember's broader routing (CLAUDE.md + docs/ + memory).
